text.title: AI-Generated IaC Review Gate Output Contract
text.summary: JSON-schema output contract the subagent applying ai-generated-iac-review-gate must produce. Required fields, forbidden patterns, allowed transformations, plus valid + invalid worked examples.

section.title: Output schema (JSON Schema draft-07)

forbidden.pattern: ai_assisted == true AND human_signoff missing for medium+ blast radius.
blast_radius unset or 'unknown' on a production-scoped change.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Order arrays deterministically by their natural key before serialising.

example.note: All required fields populated; forbidden patterns absent.
Missing the first required field — schema rejects.

list.item: All required fields present and non-null.
